checks.detail: 22 top-level tests (incl. 4 new: TestCrashInjectionRecovery [2 subtests], TestCrashInjectionRecoveryTornTailInNonLastSegmentErrors, TestReplayCRCCorruption, TestOpenWriterResumeTornTailDiscardsAndTruncates [2 subtests], TestFsyncDurabilitySubprocessCrash), all pass, 0 regressions vs. pre-change baseline (18 pre-existing tests re-verified passing before implementation began).
5/5 green, ~1.25s each, no flakiness observed in the subprocess-kill test
whole engine module (not just wal package) builds and vets clean

note: This is internal sanity only (I4 invariant): implementation agent does not self-verify against the acceptance criteria as a substitute for /cdr:verify.
